Core Physics / Metrics: Net CO₂e mass, Energy used, Grid mix.
Monotonicity Requirement: Prove that increased energy use per unit of carbon removed strictly increases rcarbon.
Key Research Task: Calibrate safe/gold/hard bands for net intensity using CCUS/pilot data.

Core Physics / Metrics: Habitat connectivity, Structural complexity, Colonization potential.
column6: Reducing habitat quality must monotonically increase rbiodiversity and V_t.

Normalization Goal: Higher HLR, greater surcharge → Higher r_hydraulic.
Monotonicity Requirement: Increasing hydraulic stress must strictly increase r_hydraulic.
Key Research Task: Standardize kernels and calibrate corridor bands using MAR/canal simulation data.

Monotonicity Requirement: Increasing data uncertainty must raise rcalib/rsigma and potentially trigger derate/stop.
Key Research Task: Propagate kernels to all shard families and build three-tier pipelines for rsigma.
